name: a survival legend
description: Fight to survive in a city overrun by zombies. Move fast, collect coins, upgrade your skills, and power up your weapons as endless waves close in from every side. With simple controls, intense battles, and constant pressure, every run is a test of timing and strategy. Choose smart upgrades, survive longer, revive at the right moment, and push your best score higher. Climb the leaderboard and prove you are the last survivor.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
